Devstore is a centralized library where Ravjit Singh stores and manages code files from his various projects, making them accessible to others.

USER COMMAND: Tell me about yourhost
YourHost is a self-hosting platform for Minecraft server hosting needs, allowing users to manage their servers and hosting services with a simple and intuitive interface.
USER COMMAND: Give me Install command for yourhost

[SAVED MEMORIES]:
- [YourHost Install Command]: curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Ravjit-singh/yourhost/main/install.sh | bash
- [YourHost Install]: curl command for installation
- [YourHost Overview]: YourHost is a self-hosting platform for Minecraft server hosting needs, allowing users to manage their servers and hosting services with a simple and intuitive interface.

The installation command for YourHost is: `curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Ravjit-singh/yourhost/main/install.sh | bash`
